title: 2021 sixty billion dollar share repurchase authorization
decisionQuestion: Should the board authorize a $60 billion share repurchase program?
situation: The board is considering a new share repurchase program alongside other shareholder return initiatives.

options.description: Approve the $60 billion share repurchase program
options.expectedBenefit: Returns capital to shareholders and reduces share count
options.principalRisk: Reduces cash available for other investments or debt reduction

options.description: Do not authorize the share repurchase program
options.expectedBenefit: Preserves cash for growth or debt reduction
options.principalRisk: Shareholders may prefer capital return over retained earnings

rejectedBenefit: Preserving cash for growth or debt reduction
observations: The board approved a new share repurchase program authorizing up to $60 billion
inferences: The board prioritizes returning capital to shareholders through share repurchases

evidenceSpans.exactQuote: The board of directors also approved a new share repurchase program authorizing up to $60 billion in share repurchases.
